{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Scars-faced man
| introduced = tg-01-house-of-blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|A big man with scars all over his face carries a torch that burns steadily like an orange star.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c1">''House of Blades'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
